checklist.description: Script checks for staged changes (git diff --cached) and exits if nothing is staged
checklist.name: Staged change check

checklist.description: Script checks staged diff breadth (file count, insertion count, or workspace package count) and refuses to proceed if too broad
checklist.name: Scope gate enforcement

checklist.description: Risk matrix lists crypto, CI/automation, dependency lockfiles, and auth/secrets as high risk
checklist.name: High risk classification

checklist.description: Risk matrix lists new files, config changes, and UI as medium risk
checklist.name: Medium risk classification

checklist.description: Risk matrix lists tests-only, comments, and formatting as low risk
checklist.name: Low risk classification

checklist.description: Script extracts files-changed count, file paths for refs, branch name, and timestamp from the staged diff and git state
checklist.name: Metadata extraction

checklist.description: The produced diary entry payload includes operator, tool, risk-level, refs, branch, scope, and timestamp metadata fields
checklist.name: Diary entry payload

checklist.description: Commit message format includes a MoltNet-Diary: <entry-id> trailer in a separate -m block
checklist.name: MoltNet-Diary trailer

checklist.description: Commit message uses conventional commit format: type(scope): description
checklist.name: Conventional commit format

checklist.description: Script stops and reports unavailability when diary tools are unreachable — does NOT skip or offer to skip
checklist.name: Unavailable diary handling

checklist.description: Script or specification mentions checking for architectural decisions and writing a semantic entry before the procedural commit entry
checklist.name: Semantic entry before procedural

checklist.description: Script or specification treats high-risk commits differently by making the diary entry cryptographically immutable (e.g. a signing flag) and verifying the result
checklist.name: High-risk immutable signing

checklist.description: Commit format spec does NOT include Co-Authored-By trailers
checklist.name: No Co-Authored-By

context: Tests whether the agent implements the accountable commit workflow correctly: scope gate, risk classification, metadata gathering, diary entry structure, commit message format with MoltNet-Diary trailer, high-risk signing, and behavior when diary tools are unavailable.
